# AI Resume Builder - Copilot Instructions

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Scaffold the React Vite TypeScript Tailwind project
- [x] Create project structure and directories
- [x] Initialize package.json with dependencies
- [x] Add Firebase and Gemini API configuration files
- [x] Create core pages and components
- [x] Set up authentication flow
- [x] Implement Firebase services
- [x] Add PDF parsing service
- [x] Create Gemini AI integration
- [x] Build resume analysis results UI
- [x] Set up routing and navigation
- [x] Add error handling and validation
- [x] Document environment variables
- [ ] Test all core features
- [ ] Final cleanup and optimization

## Tech Stack

**Frontend:** React 18 + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
**Backend:** Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Storage)
**AI:** Gemini API for resume analysis
**Libraries:** react-router-dom, react-hook-form, react-dropzone, axios, pdfjs-dist

## Key Features

1. Google Authentication with Firebase
2. Resume PDF upload with validation
3. AI-powered resume analysis using Gemini
4. ATS score calculation
5. Resume improvement suggestions
6. Job opportunity recommendations
7. Analysis history and persistence
8. Responsive modern UI with glassmorphism

## Environment Variables Required

```
VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=
VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=
VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=
VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=
VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=
VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=
VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY=
```

## Next Steps

1. Create complete project structure
2. Install all dependencies
3. Configure Firebase project
4. Add Gemini API key
5. Run development server
6. Test authentication flow
